title: helichrysum denae
intro: Helichrysum denae, also known as the Cape marigold or gold of pride, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum denae include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
